attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   HDR_INFO.HEADER_ID, 
			   HDR_INFO.GLOBAL_NAME,
		           HDR_INFO.SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD,
			   HDR_INFO.SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD
		   FROM   (    
		   SELECT  HEADER_ID,
				      GLOBAL_NAME,
				      ATTRIBUTE16, 
				      SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),1,3)  AS SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD,
				      SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),4 ,6) AS SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD
		 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS
		WHERE ATTRIBUTE16 IS NOT NULL  AND  CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM( ATTRIBUTE16))=9
		     AND (SUBSTR( TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),1,3),SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),4 ,6))     
		      IN(SELECT TRIM(BK_COMPANY_CODE),TRIM(BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)     
		      FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT) 
		         
		   	UNION 
		   SELECT    HEADER_ID,
		                        GLOBAL_NAME,
		                        ATTRIBUTE16, 
		                        SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),1,3)  AS SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD,
		                        SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),5 ,6) AS SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD
		 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS
		WHERE ATTRIBUTE16 IS NOT NULL  AND  CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM( ATTRIBUTE16))=10  AND  INDEX(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),'-') =4
		     AND (SUBSTR( TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),1,3),SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),5,6))     
		      IN(SELECT TRIM(BK_COMPANY_CODE),TRIM(BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)     FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT)
		      
		    UNION 
		      
		       SELECT   HEADER_ID,
		                         GLOBAL_NAME,
		                         ATTRIBUTE16, 
		                        '0'||SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),1,2)  AS SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD, 
		                         SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),3 ,6) AS SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD
		 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS
		WHERE ATTRIBUTE16 IS NOT NULL AND  CHAR_LENGTH(ATTRIBUTE16)=8
		       AND ( '0'||SUBSTR( TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),1,2), SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),3 ,6))     
		      IN(SELECT TRIM(BK_COMPANY_CODE),TRIM(BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)     FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT) 
		      
		UNION 
		
		SELECT HEADER_ID,
		                GLOBAL_NAME,
		                ATTRIBUTE16,
		                SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),10,3)  AS SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD,
		                SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),14 ,6) AS SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS
		WHERE ATTRIBUTE16 IS NOT NULL  AND  CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM( ATTRIBUTE16))=19  AND  INDEX(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),'-') =13  
		AND  INDEX(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),':') =8
		AND (SUBSTR( TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),10,3),SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),14,6))     
		IN(SELECT TRIM(BK_COMPANY_CODE),TRIM(BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)     FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT)
		UNION 
		SELECT HEADER_ID,
		                GLOBAL_NAME,
		                ATTRIBUTE16,
		                SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),7,3)  AS SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD,
		                SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),10 ,6) AS SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS
		WHERE ATTRIBUTE16 IS NOT NULL  
		   AND  CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM( ATTRIBUTE16))=15 
		   AND  INDEX(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),'#') =5 
		   AND INDEX(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),',') =6
		   AND (SUBSTR( TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),7,3),SUBSTR(TRIM(ATTRIBUTE16),10,6))
		    IN (  SELECT TRIM(BK_COMPANY_CODE),TRIM(BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE)     
		FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT) )  HDR_INFO

SELECT                
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  ,
NSOT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,
NSOT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  ,
NSOT.SS_CODE SS_CD  ,
NSOT.START_SSP_DATE START_SSP_DATE  ,
NSOT.START_TV_DATETIME START_TV_DTM  ,
NSOT.END_SSP_DATE END_SSP_DATE  ,
NSOT.END_TV_DATETIME END_TV_DTM  ,
'=' AUTO_BOOK_FLAG  ,
SOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT ,
NULL AS ORDER_PROMOTION_CD  ,
NULL AS ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT  ,
NULL AS SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD  ,
SOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT  ,
COALESCE(NPPT_BILL.ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY  ,
COALESCE(NPPT_SHIP.ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,-999) SHIP_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY   ,
NULL AS SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID  ,
NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT  ,
COALESCE(NPPT_SOLD.ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,-999) SOLD_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY  ,
CASE WHEN   SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6 LIKE 'AA%' THEN SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6 ELSE      NULL END       SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM  ,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM  ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER  ,
CASE     WHEN (NCST.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NSOE.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL) THEN 'N' ELSE      'Y' END       DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG ,
SOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD ,
'=' ACTION_CODE ,
'=' DML_TYPE   ,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS COMPLETE_ORDER_DTM  ,
CASE 
                WHEN   SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 IS NULL THEN 'N' 
                WHEN   SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 LIKE '%TAA%' THEN 'Y' 
ELSE      'N' END       AS SO_TAA_FLG  , 
CASE     
WHEN SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 IS NULL THEN NULL 
                WHEN   SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 = 'TAA' THEN NULL 
                WHEN   SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 IN ('TAA-DO', 'DO' ) THEN 'DO' 
                WHEN   SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4 IN ('TAA-DX', 'DX' ) THEN 'DX' 
ELSE      NULL END       AS SO_DPAS_RATING_CD  ,  
NSOREF.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
'=' SO_TAX_EXEMPTED_FLG ,
'=' SO_GSA_FLG , 
(CASE     WHEN SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN '='   
WHEN   SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5 NOT IN('Y','N') THEN '='  
ELSE        SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5  END       )  AS SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG,  
NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVCS_PROJECT_ID ,
NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVS_PROJ_DESCR , 
EAPT.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME  AS BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME ,
NULL SRC_RPTD_SO_FINANCIAL_DEPT_ID , 
NULL SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
NULL SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD, 
NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  AS PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
SOOHA.RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM  ,  
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) SO_CLOSED_DTM,
'='  AS CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD ,  
'N'  AS DROP_SHIP_FLG ,  
NULL AS INVOICE_STRATEGY_CD ,
COALESCE(SOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,'=')  AS SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD ,
'=' AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG,   
SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT ,

CASE    WHEN   NRO.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT  IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE      'N' END   AS REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE ,
COALESCE(NRO.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT,-999)  AS RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT ,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7 AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM ,
SOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
SOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID AS ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
CAST(NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME  as DATE) AS DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,
NULL AS CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
NULL AS SOURCE_REPORTED_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID, /* Q1FY12 CCW7.0 change */
'NOT FOUNDATION' AS FOUNDATION_ORDER_CD , /* Q1FY12 ICPM change */
'UNK' AS COUNTRY_ENBLMNT_COUNTRY_CD,  /* Q2FY12 CE INDIA change */
'N' AS SO_IN_CG1_FLG,
'N' AS SO_IN_SJ_FLG,
'=' AS CBN_FLG /*Added as part of Sales_orders changes for August QWN032,2014*/,
COALESCE(SOOHA.REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN' ) AS REPLACEMENT_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(SOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE , 'UNKNOWN') AS RETURN_REASON_CD
FROM    $$STGDB.WI_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA 

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT 
 ON     ( SOOHA.HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
 AND       SOOHA.SS_CODE  = NSOT.SS_CODE ) 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
ON  ( SOOHA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ) 
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_RMA_REQUEST NRR 
ON ( NRR.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM =CASE 
WHEN   SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6 LIKE 'AA%' THEN SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6  
ELSE NULL END) 

/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_SOLD 
ON ( NPPT_SOLD.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID
AND NPPT_SOLD.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y')*/

LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SEL ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,ERP_CONTACT_ID,CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_SOLD  
JOIN $$STGDB.WI_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA
ON   ( NPPT_SOLD.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID  
AND       NPPT_SOLD.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' AND NPPT_SOLD.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y' /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
AND SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID   IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY 1,2,3
) NPPT_SOLD
ON          ( NPPT_SOLD.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID  
AND       NPPT_SOLD.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' AND NPPT_SOLD.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y' /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
   

/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_SHIP 
ON (NPPT_SHIP.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID /
AND NPPT_SHIP.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y') */
            
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SEL ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,ERP_CONTACT_ID,CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_SHIP  JOIN $$STGDB.WI_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA
ON          ( NPPT_SHIP.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA. SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID  
AND       NPPT_SHIP.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' AND NPPT_SHIP.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y' /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
AND SOOHA. SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID     IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY 1,2,3
                ) NPPT_SHIP
                ON          (NPPT_SHIP.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID  
                AND       NPPT_SHIP.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' AND NPPT_SHIP.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y' /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
   

/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_BILL 
ON ( NPPT_BILL.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID 
AND NPPT_BILL.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y') */
             
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                ( SEL ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,ERP_CONTACT_ID,CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE
                FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY NPPT_BILL  JOIN $$STGDB.WI_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA
                ON          ( NPPT_BILL.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA. INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID    
                AND       NPPT_BILL.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' AND NPPT_BILL.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y' /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
                AND SOOHA. INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID     IS NOT NULL 
                GROUP BY 1,2,3
                ) NPPT_BILL
                ON          ( NPPT_BILL.ERP_CONTACT_ID = SOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID  
                AND       NPPT_BILL.CUST_SVC_CUST_CONTACT_ROLE <> 'Y' AND NPPT_BILL.COMMERCE_CONTACT_ROLE         ='Y' /* Added part of Ops CR : sounsubr*/)  
                
/*LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOREF
ON(CAST (NSOREF.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(240)) = SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12 
AND NSOREF.SS_CODE=(CASE WHEN SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC' 
 WHEN SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END)) Release8.0 */  
LEFT JOIN 
                ( SEL sales_order_key,BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,NSOREF.SS_CODE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOREF 
                  JOIN $$STGDB.WI_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA 
                ON          (CAST (NSOREF.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(240)) = SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12
                AND       NSOREF.SS_CODE= SOOHA.SS_CODE)
                GROUP BY 1,2,3
                ) NSOREF
                ON          (CAST (NSOREF.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(240)) = SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12
                AND       NSOREF.SS_CODE= SOOHA.SS_CODE)
                

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM EAPT  
                ON          (EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID = SOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID  
                AND       EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME = SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME) 
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SELECT RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY FROM 
(SELECT RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,CS_SO_TASK_OBSOLETE_FLG FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK
  QUALIFY RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY ORDER BY CS_SO_TASK_CREATED_DTM DESC,SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT DESC)=1) A
  WHERE CS_SO_TASK_OBSOLETE_FLG = 'N') NCST 
ON     ( NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NCST.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY ) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN
( SELECT SALES_ORDER_KEY FROM 
(SELECT SALES_ORDER_KEY, SO_ECOMMERCE_OPERATION_CD FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_ECOMMERCE
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_KEY ORDER BY BK_SO_ECOMMERCE_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1) A
WHERE SO_ECOMMERCE_OPERATION_CD='INSERT') NSOE
ON    ( NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOE.SALES_ORDER_KEY ) 
                
                LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OM_CCA_ORD_PARTNER_CUST SOCPC  
                ON          ( SOCPC.SO_HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  
                AND       SOCPC.SS_CODE  = NSOT.SS_CODE ) 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA   
                ON          (SOCPC.SO_CUSTOMER_ID=NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT) 
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_REPAIR_ORDER NRO  
                ON          (SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7 = CAST(NRO.BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT AS VARCHAR(240)) 
                AND       SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7 IS NOT NULL )
QUALIFY               ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SOOHA.HEADER_ID,SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SOOHA.GES_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1

SELECT 
SOCABO.AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,                
SOCABO.CREATED_BY,                    
SOCABO.CREATION_DATE,                 
SOCABO.GES_PK_ID ,                    
SOCABO.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,              
SOCABO.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
SOCABO.HEADER_ID,                     
SOCABO.SERIAL_NUMBER  ,               
SOCABO.BATCH_ID ,                     
SOCABO.CREATE_DATETIME,               
SOCABO.ACTION_CODE ,                 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE      
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_AUTO_BOOKED_ORD SOCABO
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT WHERE
 SOCABO.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND
SOCABO.GLOBAL_NAME=CASE WHEN  NSOT.SS_CODE='QTC' THEN 'UO' WHEN NSOT.SS_CODE='BV'  THEN 'BO' END)

SELECT 
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SOXOH.HEADER_ID,
SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME,
SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE25 ORDER_PROMOTION_CD,
SOXOH.OT_HEADER_DISCOUNT  ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT  ,      
SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE3 SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD , 
SOXOH.FOLDER_ID SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID,
SOXOH.COMPLETE_ORDER_DATE, 
(CASE WHEN SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE17='YES' THEN 'Y' 
WHEN SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE17='NO' THEN 'N' 
WHEN SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE17 IS NULL THEN '=' 
ELSE SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE17 END) AS SO_TAX_EXEMPTED_FLG , /*Release8.0*/
(CASE WHEN SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE4='YES' THEN 'Y' 
WHEN SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE4='NO' THEN 'N' 
WHEN SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE4 IS NULL THEN '=' 
ELSE SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE4  END) AS SO_GSA_FLG, /*Release8.0*/   
SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE15 AS SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVCS_PROJECT_ID, /* Release8.0*/
SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE7 AS SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVS_PROJ_DESCR, /* Release8.0*/
WI_HDR_COM.SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD /* Release8.0*/      ,                                
WI_HDR_COM.SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD, /* Release8.0*/ 
SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE16  AS SRC_RPTD_SO_FINANCIAL_DEPT_ID,  /* Release8.0*/ 
CASE WHEN SOXOH.COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE ='CLOSED' THEN COMPLETE_ORDER_DATE
ELSE NULL END SO_CLOSED_DTM /* Release8.0 AM Changes */ 
,SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE10 AS INVOICE_STRATEGY_CD  /* Release8.0 AM Changes */ 
,(CASE WHEN SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE6 = 'Yes' THEN 'Y'  
ELSE 'N'  END ) AS DROP_SHIP_FLG   /* Release8.0 AM Changes */
,COALESCE(SOXOH.CISCO_BOOK_RESULT_CODE, '=' ) AS CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD   /* Release8.0  AM Changes */
,NULL  AS RU_REPORTED_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM /* New changes ICW */
,SOXOH.BILL_TO_EMAIL_ID  AS BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR /* ICW */
,COALESCE (SOXOH.GOVERNMENT_ORDER_FLAG ,'=') AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG /* ICW */

,'=' AS TMIP_QUOTE_ROLE /* New changes ICW */
,NULL AS  BK_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM  /* New changes ICW */
, SOXOH.ORDER_ORIGIN AS CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD   /* Release 14 CCW  */
, COALESCE(SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE18 ,'NOT FOUNDATION') /* Q1FY12 ICPM Change */
, SOXOH.GLOBAL_DEAL_ID /* Q1FY12 CCW7.0 Change */
,COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') As COUNTRY_ENBLMNT_COUNTRY_CD  /* Q2FY12 CE INDIA C hange */
,SOXOH.AUTOCANCELLATION_DATE
,SOXOH.RETURN_BY_DATE
,COALESCE(SOXOH.TAXABILITY, 'UNKNOWN') AS INTERNAL_USE_CD /*Q1FY14 GTC */
, SOXOH.CBN_IDENTIFIER/* Added as part of Sales_orders changes for August QWN032,2014*/
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HEADERS SOXOH
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
ON ( SOXOH.HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT 
AND CASE WHEN SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC'
WHEN SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN 'BV' END = NSOT.SS_CODE ) 
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_HDR_COM_DEP WI_HDR_COM
ON(SOXOH.HEADER_ID=WI_HDR_COM.HEADER_ID
AND SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME =WI_HDR_COM.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC /* Q2FY12 CE INDIA C hange */
ON NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=SOXOH.ATTRIBUTE33 /* Q2FY12 CE INDIA C hange */
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SOXOH.HEADER_ID,SOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SOXOH.GES_UPDATE_DATE DESC)  =1

SELECT 
EOCABO.AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,                
EOCABO.CREATED_BY,                    
EOCABO.CREATION_DATE,                 
EOCABO.GES_PK_ID ,                    
EOCABO.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,              
EOCABO.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
EOCABO.HEADER_ID,                     
EOCABO.SERIAL_NUMBER  ,               
EOCABO.BATCH_ID ,                     
EOCABO.CREATE_DATETIME,               
EOCABO.ACTION_CODE                  
         
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_CEC_AUTO_BOOKED_ORD EOCABO
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_AUTO_BOOKED_ORD SOCABO WHERE EOCABO.HEADER_ID=SOCABO.HEADER_ID
  AND EOCABO.GLOBAL_NAME=SOCABO.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT 
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
SOCABO.HEADER_ID,
SOCABO.GLOBAL_NAME,
SOCABO.AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,                
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_CEC_AUTO_BOOKED_ORD SOCABO
INNER JOIN         
$$SLSORDDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
ON SOCABO.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND
 SOCABO.GLOBAL_NAME=CASE WHEN  NSOT.SS_CODE='QTC' THEN 'UO' WHEN NSOT.SS_CODE='BV'  THEN 'BO' END
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 	SOCABO.HEADER_ID,SOCABO.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SOCABO.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1

SELECT
SOOHA.HEADER_ID,
SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME ,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6,
SOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS,
SOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS,
SOOHA.ORG_ID,
SOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID ,
SOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,
SOOHA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SOOHA.CREATED_BY ,
SOOHA.CREATION_DATE,
SOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,
SOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4, /* Release 6 */
SOOHA.ADL_ATTRIBUTE4,   /* Release 6 */        
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5 /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12 /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG, /*Release8.0 AM changes*/ 
SOOHA.CANCEL_ORDER_DATE ,  /*Release8.0 AM changes*/    
SOOHA.BATCH_ID ,
SOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME,
SOOHA.ACTION_CODE, 
SOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG , /* ICW */ 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7 /* REPAIR CHANGES */,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE13,/*CSSO CHANGES*/
SOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA 
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_V1 NSOT 
   WHERE NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT = SOOHA.HEADER_ID 
   AND NSOT.SS_CD = (CASE WHEN SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC ' 
             WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END) )
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
WHERE  SOOHA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
UNION
SELECT
SOOHA.HEADER_ID,
SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME ,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6,
SOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS,
SOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS,
SOOHA.ORG_ID ,
SOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,
SOOHA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SOOHA.CREATED_BY,
SOOHA.CREATION_DATE,
SOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE ,
SOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4, /* Release 6 */
SOOHA.ADL_ATTRIBUTE4,   /* Release 6 */         
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5 /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12 /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG, /*Release8.0 AM changes*/  
SOOHA.CANCEL_ORDER_DATE ,  /*Release8.0 AM changes*/    
SOOHA.BATCH_ID ,
SOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME,
SOOHA.ACTION_CODE, 
SOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG , /* ICW */ 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7 /* REPAIR CHANGES */,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE13,/*CSSO CHANGES*/
SOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA 
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.N_RMA_REQUEST NRR 
    WHERE CASE WHEN SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6 LIKE 'AA%' THEN SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6 
       ELSE NULL END = NRR.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM )
       
UNION
SELECT
SOOHA.HEADER_ID,
SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME ,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE6,
SOOHA.PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS,
SOOHA.SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS,
SOOHA.ORG_ID ,
SOOHA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.SOLD_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID,
SOOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,
SOOHA.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SOOHA.CREATED_BY,
SOOHA.CREATION_DATE,
SOOHA.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE ,
SOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE4, /* Release 6 */
SOOHA.ADL_ATTRIBUTE4,   /* Release 6 */         
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE5 /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE12 /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID /*Release8.0*/,
SOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG, /*Release8.0 AM changes*/  
SOOHA.CANCEL_ORDER_DATE ,  /*Release8.0 AM changes*/    
SOOHA.BATCH_ID ,
SOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME,
SOOHA.ACTION_CODE, 
SOOHA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG , /* ICW */ 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE7 /* REPAIR CHANGES */,
SOOHA.ATTRIBUTE13,/*CSSO CHANGES*/
SOOHA.RETURN_REASON_CODE
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OM_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SOOHA 
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM EAPT 
WHERE EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID = SOOHA.PAYMENT_TERM_ID
AND EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME = SOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME)/*Release8.0*/
